# AI writer document fixtures

`standard-unicode.hwp` and `table-text.hwpx` come from
[`edwardkim/rhwp`](https://github.com/edwardkim/rhwp/tree/8d3bfa4b92174b16bac587fe1409975cf34ba566/samples)
at commit `8d3bfa4b92174b16bac587fe1409975cf34ba566`.
They are used only to verify local, browser-compatible text extraction.

`korean-multipage.pdf` and `scan-no-text.pdf` are generated test documents.
